passedAssertions.evidence: Baseline artifact tests/artifacts/milestone-a-baseline.snapshot.json contains inventory by layer (countsBySurface/countsByTaxonomyLayer), pass/fail/skip counts, skip reasons/locations, and top durations. Deterministic reruns succeeded: bun run test --run => 11 files passed, 196 tests passed; uv run pytest -q -rs --durations=10 => 341 passed, 43 skipped, 0 failed with top durations listed.

tests/artifacts/milestone-a-prune-mapping.json maps each removed test to explicit low-value categories/rationales (LV-IMPLEMENTATION-DUPLICATE, LV-REDUNDANT-PRESENCE-CHECK). git show --name-status --oneline 811d800 confirms only prune mapping artifact addition and tests/test_runtime_events.py modification for this prune commit.

tests/artifacts/milestone-a-prune-mapping.json marks both removed tests as confidence-critical with mapped stronger replacements in tests/test_runtime_event_contract_parity.py. Targeted verification passed: uv run pytest -q tests/test_runtime_event_contract_parity.py => 3 passed.

Baseline artifact tests/artifacts/milestone-a-baseline.snapshot.json includes explicit classificationCriteria and a full taxonomyMatrix classifying frontend/backend/e2e files by unit/integration/e2e with rationale strings; repository scrutiny review .factory/validation/test-value-reset/scrutiny/reviews/test-reset-baseline-inventory-and-taxonomy.json is status=pass for this baseline/taxonomy requirement.

tests/artifacts/milestone-a-prune-mapping.json skipDebt section reports baseline and final parity (43 skipped, same reason class, no new skip locations). Verification run uv run pytest -q -rs --durations=10 also reports 341 passed, 43 skipped and identical reason class ('Phase 5+ executors not yet implemented').

Determinism controls are explicitly documented in tests/artifacts/milestone-a-frontend-high-signal-scenarios.json (manual requestAnimationFrame queue/flush) and tests/artifacts/milestone-a-backend-high-signal-scenarios.json (autouse run_control state reset fixture + explicit async event synchronization). Full vitest/pytest reruns succeeded without intermittent failures during this validation.

frictions.description: Initial broad grep across repo exceeded output buffer and required narrowing to targeted files/patterns.
One git show invocation used argument order that returned no diff content; reran with corrected argument order to capture the pruning diff.

commandsRun.observation: Vitest passed: 11 files, 196 tests, 0 failed, 0 skipped.
Pytest passed: 341 passed, 43 skipped, 0 failed; skip reason class remained 'Phase 5+ executors not yet implemented'; top durations printed.
Replacement parity suite passed: 3 passed in 0.09s.
Prune commit shows A tests/artifacts/milestone-a-prune-mapping.json and M tests/test_runtime_events.py.
Diff confirms removal of two low-value tests: test_known_runtime_events_contains_core_run_content and test_runtime_event_contract_version_is_exposed.

notes: Validated only assigned assertions (VAL-TEST-001/002/003/004/010/011) via CLI contract/artifact evidence and deterministic command reruns. No production/business logic was modified.
